resources.string: Account Not Found
Activation email failed to send. Please try again later.
Activation code error. Please check or try again later.
Activation code required. Please try again later.
Your account has been activated.
Cancel
OK
Your account has been frozen. Please contact DJI Support.
Confirmation password does not match the new password. Please re-enter.
Your phone number has already been linked to an email address. Please use another.
This email address is already associated with an account. Please use another address or sign into that account.
Account has existed. Please check or sign up.
Email address is already registered.
System error. Please try again later.
Invalid account format. Please check.
Invalid email address. Please check.
Enter verification code.
System error. Please try again later.
Your account has been frozen. Please contact DJI Support.
System error. Please try again later.
This user name already exists.
Account has not activated. Please check you email and activate before signing in.
Your email address has already been linked to a phone number. Please use another number.
Invalid Phone Number
This phone number is registered. Please use another one or sign in.
Verification Code Error
Invalid Password
Password should be 8 to 20 characters long and contain numbers and letters.
A verification code has been sent to the email address you provided
Operation failed. Please check your network connection and restart DJI GO, then try again.
The number of attempts exceed the limit. Change a phone number or try again later.
Product serial number has been linked.
Success
Login information is invalid. Please sign in again later.
System error. Please try again later.
Login information invalid. Please sign in again later.
Update failed.
Invalid email address.
Account already exists. Please login using that address.
You are not signed in.
The account you entered was not found. Please check and sign up.
Invalid verification code. Enter again.
Enter verification code
Login status expired
Network Error
一One key algo support Android 8 and higher
Disable Follow Mode
Enable Follow Mode
Only Qualcomm processors later than 660 can be supported by Super Resolution
Pixel devices are not supported by Super Resolution.
Resolution greater than 720p is not supported by Super Resolution.
